definition: The ratio of AI-related capital expenditure to attributable AI revenue remains elevated at ~2.5-4.5x after debate adjustment (KB estimate 4-6x), representing the central vulnerability metric for AI equity valuations. Both numerator uncertainty (what counts as AI capex) and denominator uncertainty (what counts as AI revenue) persist.
evidence: Debate-adjusted range: ~2.5-4.5x after stress-testing from both sides
Challenger_01's 1.5-3.0x refuted (defensive capex inclusion = definitional gerrymandering)
Export controls permanently shrink achievable TAM by 15-25%
Ratio must compress for both equity valuations and dollar capital flow support to sustain
open_questions: Whether AI revenue definition can ever be standardized across companies
Timeline for capex/revenue ratio to converge to sustainable levels
Whether defensive capex should be partially attributed to AI
